categories: [news, roundup]
tags: [dpdpa, india, privacy, global, news]
---

## India: DPDPA Implementation & Challenges

**DPDPA Rules 2025 Under Scrutiny as Enforcement Nears**
With the Digital Personal Data Protection Rules 2025 now finalized, legal experts are actively analyzing their implications for businesses and individuals, comparing India's "middle path" approach to global data protection paradigms. These rules are crucial for operationalizing the DPDPA's principles, though some aspects, like the absence of a statutory definition of "harm," continue to spark debate regarding interpretational clarity in future adjudications.
([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxQUHUtVmUwb0VxaWMzNmdIMGVubHQzdTVlTXRQbTNYU0hESHBQbXF3TmRvdUVlam1nbndmUktnWS13VnZxaXU2OURFcHc2b0V5d1VrLUJqR3pid0VyWjNUNWtoUmhIVkl3SDV0NjUtZHNqVWw0NUItbnNmTDcyQ3MzUmFOd1Y0cnMtbnRJUmJHbjJmNHFOcWstTXJUb0NrVzA1TExRZA?oc=5))
([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxOZHFHUHJTc0pzTzY4QmlBMS1zVWE5LVlFeTc2RV9VQk9yUWd6c25PbFlVa2owWGsyZzUzZVRlV2lvTkt0NHg1eC03NUd4eFFEWDJtZWdfQjhqdEt4SDFtaU5NSkx0UjJ6ZUhNdllKR0V2RzV1UEhXUG5ySFVub3MwYlNBWXBtWlJhMzl3NnBzbUdlR1hId20tTEtSZkU2YXA5?oc=5))
([Source](https://news.google.?oc=5))

**Businesses Race to Achieve DPDPA Readiness**
As the DPDPA's full enforcement approaches, Indian enterprises are under increasing pressure to secure data at its source and conduct thorough privacy gap assessments. This urgency extends to MSMEs, who are being encouraged to adopt compliance strategies without necessarily requiring large IT teams, focusing on fundamental data protection practices and endpoint security.
([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitgFBVV95cUxOaEVDMVFZZndJVHZJcnZvUFUtOVowTVJ2ODg3WWtpeDkyLWZVakNtZGcwTU55UkxhZ1NWX3hMU0NXMF82dXdYbW84RjZjWGdCTHVHMHNjN2dfUEF4YXFIclhTcHBqZDhfbkNrcVRVMlM3TVkyY3c5OXRmZmxHRXB3UDU5RmRaQzFDVGttREFsbVJsa3R3dVJ2QndITWI1ZVRsRHZYZHBqZWFCQXpyZmk2QmlNdndzdw?oc=5))
